title: Flea Treatment in Fieldston, Bronx | $350 - $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Fieldston, Bronx. Effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Prices from $350 to $650. Same-day service available.
intro: Fieldston's beautiful historic homes and tree-lined streets deserve protection from flea infestations that can quickly spread throughout your property. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services specifically designed for Fieldston's unique residential landscape, from sprawling Tudor estates to charming single-family homes. Our proven methods eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your family and pets can enjoy a pest-free environment.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Fieldston residents, we understand the specific pest challenges facing this prestigious neighborhood's older homes and lush gardens. Our licensed technicians use family-safe and pet-friendly treatments that protect your property while delivering results you can count on, backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Fieldston's mature landscapes, proximity to Van Cortlandt Park, and abundance of wildlife create ideal conditions for flea populations to thrive, especially in homes with pets. The neighborhood's historic architecture, including many homes built in the 1920s and 1930s, requires careful, professional treatment to address flea infestations without damaging these valuable properties.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Fieldston?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Fieldston typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in my Fieldston home?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas eliminated first. However, because flea eggs and pupae can survive initial treatment, a complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks with a follow-up treatment scheduled 14 days after the initial service to break the flea life cycle completely.

faqs.question: Are flea treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry, after which your home is completely safe to occupy normally.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Fieldston home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation improves treatment effectiveness. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and furniture thoroughly, washing pet bedding in hot water, and removing pets during treatment. Our technicians will provide a detailed preparation checklist during your inspection to ensure optimal results for your specific situation.
